description: Design a frozen orbit for the Terra-Vision-3 Earth observation satellite based on the mission requirements in ~/Desktop/eo_mission_requirements.txt. Compute the frozen eccentricity for a 700 km altitude sun-synchronous mission using the J2/J3 balance condition with an Argument of Perigee (AOP) of 90 degrees. Create and run a GMAT script named ~/GMAT_output/frozen_orbit_script.script that compares two spacecraft: TV3_Frozen (using the computed frozen eccentricity and AOP = 90°) and TV3_Reference (using AOP = 0°). The simulation must use a force model with at least a 10x10 Earth gravity field, atmospheric drag, and solar radiation pressure, propagated for 60 days. Generate a stability analysis report at ~/GMAT_output/frozen_orbit_report.txt containing the following labeled values: frozen_ecc, frozen_ecc_variation, reference_ecc_variation, frozen_alt_range_km, reference_alt_range_km, and stability_ratio. Login: username=ga, password=password123
